note: Remote A2A agents this pipe DISCOVERS + can dispatch to. Vendor default is empty -- operators opt in via /etc/mios/ai/v1/a2a-peers.json overlay or ~/.config/mios/ai/v1/a2a-peers.json. Each entry: {id, url, enabled?, label?, headers?}. On agent-pipe startup the client GETs <url>/.well-known/agent-card.json (or /agent.json or /v1/agent-card), parses skills, and exposes them at /v1/a2a/skills. POST /v1/a2a/dispatch forwards a message to a chosen peer (by id) or routes by declared skill. Complements the local _AGENT_REGISTRY (mios.toml [agents.*]) -- THAT is the in-process roster, this is the FEDERATED peer network.
